parameters.jsonBody:
={ "model": "mistral-large-latest", "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a job listing editor for an Indonesian job portal. Your job is to CLEAN UP, RESTRUCTURE, and generate SEO metadata from the given raw job listing HTML. CORE PRINCIPLE: - Stay faithful to the original content. DO NOT add sentences, phrases, or information that do not exist in the source. - DO NOT add filler intros like "Bergabunglah", "Apakah kamu", "Ini adalah kesempatan", etc. - DO NOT add a closing paragraph encouraging people to apply. - DO NOT paraphrase excessively. Keep the original meaning and wording, just fix grammar and structure. WHAT YOU SHOULD DO: - Fix HTML structure: use

for section headings,
    /
  • for lists,

    for paragraphs - Fix grammar and typos if any - DO NOT include any heading like "Deskripsi Pekerjaan", "Kualifikasi", "Tanggung Jawab", etc. in the content. The CMS adds headings automatically. Only output the body content without section headings. - Remove colons (:) from any text - Remove em dashes - Convert

      to
        for consistency - Strip all and tags. No bold, no italic. Clean plain text inside structural HTML tags only. - DO NOT use markdown syntax WHAT YOU MUST NOT DO: - DO NOT add new content, sentences, or paragraphs not in the original - DO NOT add opening/intro paragraphs if the original jumps straight into sections - DO NOT add closing/CTA paragraphs - DO NOT fabricate benefits, requirements, or company details - DO NOT change the tone to be more marketing or sales-like - DO NOT remove information from the original - DO NOT use or tags anywhere - DO NOT include

        or

        headings in the content field OUTPUT FORMAT: Respond ONLY in valid JSON with this exact structure: { "content": "HTML string without any headings, just

        and

        • content", "excerpt": "plain text, max 150 chars", "meta_description": "plain text, 140-160 chars", "focus_keyword": "lowercase, 2-4 words", "slug": "lowercase-hyphens-max-80-chars", "job_requirements": "HTML string with
          • format", "job_responsibilities": "HTML string with
            • format", "job_skills": ["array", "of", "skill", "strings"], "job_benefits": ["array", "of", "benefit", "strings"] } FIELD RULES: - content: The cleaned-up HTML body of the job listing. NO headings (

              ,

              , etc). Only

              paragraphs and

              • lists. The CMS adds section structure automatically. - excerpt: 1-2 sentence plain text summary of the job in Bahasa Indonesia. Max 150 chars. No HTML. - meta_description: Mention position and company context. Plain text. 140-160 chars. - focus_keyword: The main search term a job seeker would use. Lowercase Bahasa Indonesia. 2-4 words. - slug: Based on job position and company. Lowercase, hyphens only. Max 80 chars. - job_requirements: Extract ALL qualification/requirement points and format as
                • . Only from source. - job_responsibilities: Extract ALL responsibility/task points and format as
                  • . Only from source. - job_skills: Extract relevant skills mentioned or implied in the listing. Return as array of short strings in Bahasa Indonesia or English as appropriate. Examples: ["Negosiasi", "Komunikasi", "Microsoft Office", "Presentasi"]. If no skills can be extracted, return empty array []. - job_benefits: Extract any benefits mentioned in the listing. Return as array of short strings. Examples: ["Asuransi kesehatan", "Bonus tahunan", "Tunjangan transportasi"]. If no benefits are mentioned, return empty array []. DO NOT fabricate benefits. CRITICAL: - Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no code blocks, no extra text. - content, job_requirements, job_responsibilities are HTML strings. - excerpt, meta_description, focus_keyword, slug are plain text strings. - job_skills and job_benefits are arrays of strings. - DO NOT fabricate any information. - DO NOT put any headings in the content field." }, { "role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify($json.job.content) }} } ], "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 5000, "top_p": 0.9, "frequency_penalty": 0.4, "presence_penalty": 0.5, "response_format": { "type": "json_object" } }

={
  "title": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.title }}",
  "content": "{{ JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).content }}",
  "excerpt": "{{ JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).excerpt }}",
  "slug": "{{ JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).slug }}",
  "featured_image": "",
  "publish_date": "",
  "status": "published",
  "seo_title": "Lowongan {{ $('Get Job').item.json.title }} - {{ $('Get Job').item.json.city }}",
  "meta_description": "{{ JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).meta_description }}",
  "focus_keyword": "{{ JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).focus_keyword }}",
  "job_company_name": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.company_name }}",
  "job_company_logo": "",
  "job_company_website": "",
  "job_employment_type_id": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.job_type }}",
  "job_experience_level_id": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.experience }}",
  "job_education_level_id": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.education }}",
  "job_salary_min": {{ $('Get Job').item.json.salary_min ?? 0 }},
  "job_salary_max": {{ $('Get Job').item.json.salary_max ?? 0 }},
  "job_salary_currency": "IDR",
  "job_salary_period": "bulan",
  "job_is_salary_negotiable": false,
  "job_province_id": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.province }}",
  "job_regency_id": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.city }}",
  "job_district_id": "",
  "job_village_id": "",
  "job_address_detail": "",
  "job_is_remote": {{ $('Get Job').item.json.work_policy === 'Remote Working' }},
  "job_is_hybrid": {{ $('Get Job').item.json.work_policy === 'Hybrid Working' }},
  "job_application_email": "",
  "job_application_url": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.link }}",
  "job_application_deadline": "",
  "job_skills": {{ JSON.stringify(JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).job_skills) }},
  "job_benefits": {{ JSON.stringify(JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).job_benefits) }},
  "job_requirements": "{{ JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).job_requirements }}",
  "job_responsibilities": "{{ JSON.parse($('Mistral - Rewrite Content').item.json.choices[0].message.content).job_responsibilities }}",
  "job_categories": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.job_category }}",
  "job_tags": "{{ $('Get Job').item.json.tags }}"
}
